content.en:
"The Lord of Infinity vs. the Lord of Luohai!"

The voice of the Lord of the Ice Rim came.

Rushing!!!

Ye Tian and the Lord of Luohai were teleported to a void ring.

The battle is about to begin!

"Lord of Luohai!"

Ye Tian didn't know the strength of this other side level genius, but it didn't matter, he just needed to defeat the other party.

Rumble!!!!

They fought in an instant.

"The magic of the other side - the other side of the golden mang!"

Ye Tian held the high-level Divine Spear on the other side, and the golden mangs on the other side were blessed on the Heavenly Spear on the other side, and his arm urged the golden body of the other side, and the terrifying power erupted.

Just one hit!

Rumble!

The Lord of Luohai was directly knocked away, and the opponent's supernatural skills on the other side were also scattered.

At this moment, the Lord of Luohai was cracked all over his body, and he couldn't stop collapsing.

This is the power that erupts from the golden body of the other side, the blessing of the supernatural power of the other side and the blessing of the high-level divine soldiers on the other side.

"Throw in the towel!"

The Lord of Luohai hurriedly said.

Immediately.

The Lord of Luohai was sent out for treatment, otherwise he would not have been able to stop his injuries at all.

......

"The Endless Lord's Strength ......"

The Lord of Eternal Zero was shocked.

Originally, he had no hope for Ye Tian at all, thinking that Ye Tiancai had become a genius at the other side, and the magic technique he created was estimated to be only one, and it was still a very weak magic skill on the other side, and his strength was definitely average.

As long as you don't lose all five battles, it's good to be the first from the bottom.

Outcome.

Ye Tian defeated the Lord of Luohai with one move, showed the golden body of the other side, and also obtained a high-level divine spear on the other side.

Weapons are also part of strength, but it is impossible for Gu Hengshan to give Ye Tian a high-level Divine Weapon for free, so Ye Tian relied on himself to obtain a high-level Divine Soldier on the Other Shore.

The Lord of Gu Heng was also quite surprised, the newly born genius of Gu Heng Mountain was so powerful!

The Lord of the Ancient Void frowned, he found that he might not be Ye Tian's opponent, this was embarrassing!

What a huge price his father paid in order to cultivate him, but as a result, Ye Tian had no cultivation, and he still had such strength.

"How did this guy do that?"

The Lord of the Ancient Void was puzzled.

After the battle, the other side level genius will rest for a while.

After a period of time, Ye Tian's second battle began.

This time, he still defeated other other geniuses with his strong strength.

Of course.

Ye Tian's vest and the lord of Dong Yuan also showed the magic of the other side, but he did not show the golden body of the other side, so he won the first game at the cost of a miserable victory, but lost the second game.

Ye Tian didn't care about this.

As long as he can copy his real body and break into the top ten, he will lose if he loses.

The years that followed.

Ye Tian experienced one battle after another.

In the end, five wins in five battles.

And the lord of the vest winter yuan is one win in five battles.

However, even so, Junzu was very happy, and at least he won a game!

In Jun Zu's opinion, the Lord of Dong Yuan has just become a genius on the other side, and it stands to reason that it is normal to lose all of them, and now he has won a game, which is already very good!

Soon after, the first round ended.

Ye Tian still won five battles and five wins, so he naturally entered the top 100 steadily, but around the hundredth, many other level geniuses had the same record, so they needed to continue to compete.

And Ye Tian sat down to watch the play.

Time passed slowly, and finally the hundred other shore-level geniuses in the first round were determined.

Soon.

The second round began, and each of the other side level geniuses fought five battles, and then the top 50 were determined by the results.

It can be said that the other side level geniuses who can enter the top 100 are very strong, and the difference in strength between them should not be large, and sometimes whether they can advance or not depends on luck.

If you meet an opponent who is more restrained, you can hope to win and advance.

The second round, the first battle.

Ye Tian's opponent appeared.

"It's him, the Lord of the Extreme, it's a bit of a coincidence!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

The Lord of the True Pole is a relatively weak genius at the other side, but he relied on a few other side magic skills, plus high-level other side divine armor and high-level other side divine weapons, plus various other side techniques, and a little luck, and then through the play-off, he successfully promoted to the top 100.

But now, his luck is not good, and it is estimated that he will stop in the top 100.

"Infinity Lord!"

The True Extreme Lord frowned.

Although the Lord of Endless had only become a genius of the other side not long ago, he had heard about it at the beginning, but he did not expect that the Lord of Endless also had the golden body of the other side, and his attainments were very high.

"It seems that after that, I also have to study the golden incarnation on the other side, otherwise I won't be able to defeat other slightly stronger geniuses on the other side!"

The Lord of the True Extremes secretly said.

Rumble!!!!

The two sides fought each other.

Ye Tian shot directly, and injured the True Extreme Lord with one move.

The Lord of the True Pole tried to use a technique from the other side to divert damage, but was cracked by Ye Tian using another technique from the other side, and then easily pierced through the opponent's body.

"Throw in the towel!"

The Lord's Way of the Truth.

Ye Tianhui had too many techniques on the other side, and he was restrained in various ways, so they couldn't win, and they couldn't stop it with a few moves.

That's it.

Ye Tian won the first game of the second round.

After that, the second game is won and the third game is won.

On the other hand, Gu Heng Mountain's other shore-level genius Gu Void Lord was a little dangerous, and he might not be able to enter the top fifty.

After a while.

At the end of the five battles, Ye Tian was in a state of victory.

And the Lord of the Ancient Void is three wins in five battles, which is a bit dangerous.

Really.

After the second round of the competition, the Lord of the Ancient Void still needs to continue the extra match with some other other Shore level geniuses to decide whether to enter the top 50.

However, the strength of the Lord of the Ancient Void was still a little worse, and in the end, he was defeated and could not be promoted to the top fifty.

At this time.

The Lord of the Ancient Void was very unwilling, but there was no way.

He is not strong enough to complain about others.

Soon, the third round began.

It's still five battles, and the top 20 will be decided according to the results.

At this point, the odds of encountering a strong enemy are high.

In the first game of the third round, Ye Tian easily defeated the opponent, but in the second game, he met a very powerful genius at the other side.

Lord of the Void!

This Lord of the Void Land also has a part of his body on the other side of the golden body, and he can also use several magic skills on the other side, and his combat power is very powerful.

Encountering this other-level genius, Ye Tian didn't dare to hide his strength.

The scale armor on the other side is put on, and the Cave Extreme Escape Method is no longer hidden, but the other side of the Void Domain, the magic technique of the other side, he will not use it for the time being.
